performance_overview: Through 26 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-07-01) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY unavailable (persistent TLS error). All 7 trades closed same-day; zero overnight holds met criteria. Last 25 sessions have all been flat with zero entries — chronic ATR% compression across the current defensives/utilities universe is the root cause. Book is flat at $99,938.80.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean but sample is small — keep enforcing until n>=10)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap; skip entirely
Gap-up opens with RSI >60: zero qualifications across all 25 sessions; any name opening RSI >60 is a hard skip regardless of structural setup quality or conviction

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: even premarket-clean RSI names (PANW 57, AMGN 58 premarket on June 29; D 58.2 premarket on June 30) surged well past the RSI 60 ceiling on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic and persistent; do NOT chase within first 5-10 minutes of open even if RSI looked clean premarket

Current defensives/utilities universe (CFG, DTE, WEC, CNC, D, FRT, ED, NSC, KIM, AMGN, TFC): chronic ATR% compression 0.042-0.189% far below 0.30% floor; full universe refresh is highest-priority action before July 7 entry session

The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Policy is sound and conservative — no change warranted. DOWN SPY regime increases overnight gap-down risk further.
